overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Horizon Forbidden West) showing a character with red hair and tribal attire crossing a wooden rope bridge and running along a misty mountain trail through autumn foliage toward ancient ruins, featuring cinematic lighting and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden rope bridge crossing a river valley

agents.ego_description: Running steadily across a weathered wooden rope bridge, overlooking the misty water below and mountains ahead

entered.detail: Weathered wooden plank bridge with thick rope railings crossing over water
Tall rocky mountain shrouded in fog and low clouds
Calm water visible below the bridge deck
Deciduous trees with red and yellow autumn foliage lining the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a narrow wooden rope bridge suspended over a river, with misty mountains looming in the background. The bridge sways slightly as the character moves, and autumn-colored trees line the banks below.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain footpath through autumn forest

events.description: character steps off the wooden bridge onto a dirt footpath
passing a lit campfire brazier on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Running along a winding dirt trail through dense autumn forest, navigating around trees and stone outcroppings

entered.detail: Uneven dirt and gravel trail winding through the forest
Metal brazier with burning flames emitting smoke
Ancient stone markers or ruins alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, the character runs along a winding dirt path through a dense autumn forest. A lit campfire burns in a metal brazier beside the trail, and ancient stone pillars emerge from the undergrowth as the path ascends slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to ancient ruins settlement

events.description: wild boar suddenly runs across the path from left to right

agents.ego_description: Running along an elevated rocky path toward a large ruined structure in the distance, passing stone walls and metal debris

notable_agents.action: wild boar runs across the path from left to right, disappearing into the bushes

entered.detail: Large ruined building or settlement with broken walls and wooden scaffolding
Low stone retaining wall alongside the path
Rusty metal barrel or container near the wall

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the character approaches a large ancient ruin in the distance. The terrain becomes rockier with stone walls lining the trail. A wild boar suddenly darts across the path from the left, and the misty mountains shift to the left as the character continues toward the ruined settlement ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a character from a precarious rope bridge through a dense autumn forest toward a sprawling ancient ruin. It begins with the character running across a swaying wooden bridge suspended over a river, with misty mountains looming in the distance. As the character leaves the bridge, the scene shifts into a winding dirt path where a lit campfire burns in a metal brazier and ancient stone pillars begin to emerge from the autumn foliage. The terrain then becomes rockier and the path opens up, leading past stone walls as a wild boar suddenly darts across the trail. Finally, the camera continues forward as the misty mountains shift to the side, revealing a ruined settlement ahead.
